zh.lifeSummary: 當Walram II von Nassau於1220年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧時，他的父親Heinrich II von Nassau41歲，母親Mathilde von Geldern22歲。他和Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1276年1月24日在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧迪利可萊斯迪倫波格享年56歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walram II von Nassau于1220年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧时，他的父亲Heinrich II von Nassau41岁，母亲Mathilde von Geldern22岁。他和Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1276年1月24日在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧迪利可萊斯迪倫波格享年56岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nassau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Nassau, formerly the seat of an independent duchy. The placename derives from Old High German naz ‘damp, wet’ + ouwa ‘water meadow’.

History: The royal house of Nassau traces its descent from Dudo, Count of Lauenburg, who flourished between 1093 and 1117. His family acquired the county of Nassau in the 12th century. Prince Willem van Oranje-Nassau, otherwise known as William the Silent (1533–84), was the leader of the Dutch revolt against Spain in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Walram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: from a personal name denoting the older brother of the god Krishna, an avatar of the god Vishnu. It means ‘Ram the strong one’, referring to his legendary muscular strength and penchant for using farm equipment (notably the plow) as weaponry. This surname is found mainly in Guyana, and also in South Africa and Trinidad and Tobago. It is apparently not used in India.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Walram II von Nassau was born in 1220, in Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Heinrich II von Nassau, was 41 and his mother, Mathilde von Geldern, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen. He died on 24 January 1276, in Dillenburg, Dillkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 56, and was buried in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walram II von Nassau est né en 1220, à Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich II von Nassau, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Geldern, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen. Il est décédé le 24 janvier 1276, à Dillenburg, Dillkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walram II von Nassau 1220 in Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich II von Nassau 41 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Geldern 22. Er hatte mit Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Januar 1276 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Dillenburg, Dillkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland und wurde in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walram II von Nassau è nato il nel 1220 nel Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Heinrich II von Nassau, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Geldern, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen. Morì il 24 gennaio 1276, nel Dillenburg, Dillkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania.

ko.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소
ko.lifeSummary: Walram II von Nassau(이)가 1220년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich II von Nassau(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Geldern(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1276년 1월 24일 독일 플레우ss 헤센-나소 딜크레이스 딜렌버그에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 플레우ss 헤센-나소 운털라크레이스 나소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walram II von Nassau nasceu em 1220, em Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich II von Nassau, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Geldern, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen. Ele faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1276, em Dillenburg, Dillkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walram II von Nassau родился в 1220 г. в местности нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich II von Nassau было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Geldern, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen. Он умер 24 января 1276 г. в местности дилленбург, диллкрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности нассау, унтирлахнкрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Adelheid von Katzenelnbogen. Murió el 24 de enero de 1276, en Dillenburg, Dillkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania.
